indicators.name: no flat personal work surface
indicators.rationale: The absence of a flat surface at sitting height makes it impossible to set up a computer workstation.

indicators.name: arched ceiling and walls
indicators.rationale: The curved architecture obstructs a clear view of the space, making it difficult to focus on a computer screen.

indicators.name: dark stains on walls
indicators.rationale: The dark stains on the walls create a visually unappealing environment, which can be distracting.

reasoning_summary: This indoor scene is completely unsuitable for computer work (solo). The lack of a flat personal work surface, the obstructive curved architecture, and the visually unappealing dark stains on the walls make it impossible to set up a productive workstation.
